commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=23af81755d384aefcda9e477dcd58ac624c3c9cb)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `disabled` to the message tool presentation button schema, propagates `disabled: true` through Discord shared interactive/presentation mapping, and adds a focused shared-interactive test.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: `renderPresentationForDelivery` adapts the presentation before Discord rendering, and `adaptButton` drops disabled buttons unless `supportsDisabled` is true. Discord's current capability block omits that flag.
commands.review_followup: Contributor action is needed to fix the production adaptation gap and provide real behavior proof; this is not a ClawSweeper repair lane candidate while the proof gate is missing.

target.title: Preserve disabled Discord presentation buttons
target.body:
## Summary

Accepts `disabled` on portable presentation buttons and preserves it in Discord presentation button specs.

## Motivation

Closes #84183.

The runtime type already included `disabled`, and Discord button specs support disabled buttons, but the message tool schema and Discord presentation mapper dropped the field.

## Change Type

- [x] Bug fix

## Scope

- Adds `disabled` to the message tool presentation button schema.
- Copies `disabled: true` into Discord button specs for presentation and legacy interactive button mapping.
- Adds a focused test for disabled presentation button preservation.

## Linked Issue/PR

Closes #84183.

## Real behavior proof

Focused automated proof covers the deterministic mapper: a disabled presentation button now produces a Discord component button with `disabled: true`.

## Root Cause

The portable button type and low-level Discord builder already supported disabled buttons, but the schema and adapter layer did not propagate that field.

## Regression Test Plan

- `pnpm exec vitest run extensions/discord/src/shared-interactive.test.ts`

## User-visible / Behavior Changes

Callers can send disabled Discord presentation buttons through the message tool without falling back to Discord-specific payloads.

## Diagram

N/A. This is a field propagation fix.

## Security Impact

No new secrets or external calls. The change reduces accidental action availability by preserving an explicit disabled state.

## Repro + Verification

Before this change, `disabled: true` was rejected or dropped before Discord rendering. The new test verifies the generated component spec retains it.

## Evidence

Focused test command passes.

## Human Verification

Not performed against a live Discord service; the change is limited to deterministic schema and mapping behavior.

## Compatibility / Migration

Backward compatible. Existing messages render the same unless they set `disabled: true`.

## Risks

Low. Only true values are propagated.
